creator: shigeru@iij.ad.jp
text:
----Next_Part(Sun_Jan_17_17_58_02_2010_039)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit


>>>>> "Ed" == Ed Schouten <ed@80386.nl> writes:
Ed> I suspect the attached patch is slightly incorrect. I can't imagine how
Ed> including a different header file would automatically make things work.
Ed> If it doesn't use anything provided by <utmp.h>, just remove the
Ed> inclusion.

I think, your idea is better than mine.

I try to compile after deleting <utmp.h> from VBoxServiceVMInfo.cpp.
It is no errors.

So, I make new patch which delete '#include <utmp.h>' from a file.

Thanks,

-------
YAMAMOTO Shigeru
<shigeru@iij.ad.jp>

----Next_Part(Sun_Jan_17_17_58_02_2010_039)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: inline;
 filename="patch-src-VBox-Additions-common-VBoxService-VBoxServiceVMInfo.cpp"

--- src/VBox/Additions/common/VBoxService/VBoxServiceVMInfo.cpp.orig    2009-12-17 23:25:29.000000000 +0900
+++ src/VBox/Additions/common/VBoxService/VBoxServiceVMInfo.cpp 2010-01-16 18:35:45.000000000 +0900
@@ -38,7 +38,6 @@
 # include <sys/socket.h>
 # include <net/if.h>
 # include <unistd.h>
-# include <utmp.h>
 # ifdef RT_OS_SOLARIS
 #  include <sys/sockio.h>
 # endif

----Next_Part(Sun_Jan_17_17_58_02_2010_039)----
